dialogos.texto_en: I had so much fun on the banana boat,\nand I'm interested in trying out other activities too.
Yotsuba mentioned it before,\nbut this beach has a lot of great activities.\nLook, there's a guide here.
What are you doing? Signing up for activities?
Ah, Fu-kun.
No, I was just checking out what they have.\nIf there's something good, I'd like to try it.
Ah! This sea kayaking looks nice.\nYou can leisurely explore the sea.
Wow, it seems like a different kind of fun\nthan the banana boat.
There's a two-person kayak too.\nHow about it, Futaro-kun?
A-again?
Apparently, we have to align our breathwork \nand row as a team.\nDon't you think we'd be good at this?
Why did you word it like that?
Ichika, you're quite the go-getter.
Am I? Isn't this normal?
Fu-kun is getting all flustered.
I-I'm not!
Oh, I wanted to ride the jet ski too.\nIt looks so exhilarating.
Hey, let me ride with you.
No way, I can't drive it!
Why not? You have a motorcycle license, right?
But a jet ski is different.
I see.\nI thought it would be okay\nsince it's called a water motorcycle.
Come on, Ichika...
Can't you just take the exam and get a license?
It's not that easy.
Hmm, if jet skiing is out,\nthen maybe we should go with the sea kayak.
It seems like we can also go snorkeling,\nbut kayak is the best option to spend some\nalone time together.
You're really fixated on that, aren't you?
I wonder if kayaking is tiring.
I don't have experience, so I'm not sure,\nbut it might be somewhat tiring, I think?
Then, Futaro-kun, what if you get exhausted\nand left stranded at sea?
I'm not that weak.\nDon't worry, I'll turn back before that happens.
By the way, if I'm stranded at sea\nwith you, I won't feel lonely, so don't worry!
What are you talking about...?
Hey, Fu-kun,\ndon't you think Ichika is acting a bit strange today?
...No doubt, she's full of energy today.
She's so excited anyone can tell just by looking at her.
Traveling is meant to be enjoyable,\nso of course it's natural, but still.\nAt this moment, I'm a little worried.
Maybe it's just the atmosphere getting to her.\nAfter all, it's Okinawa, and the beach.
Well, there is a sense of freedom here, but...\nis it really necessary to be so obviously excited?
Maybe she's like that because\neverything around us feels like a vacation.
Hmm...\nI suppose that could be it.
What now, what now?\nWhat are you two talking about?
Oh, it's just about how everything\nis because of the ocean.
Huh?\nWhat do you mean?
No idea?
W-well, don't worry about it.
Alright! Let's keep on having fun!\nShall we try to conquer ALL the activities?!
Let's start with kayaking!\nIt seems to be the easiest one to start with.
It's good to let loose. After all,\nshe's usually busy with work, so she needs some time\nto relax and have fun once in a while.
Although it seems like she's relaxing a little too much.
But since we're on a trip, cut her some slack.
Mmm.
Wh-what?
I just felt a little jealous of Ichika.\nWhen I saw your face just now, Fu-kun,\nyou looked so kind.
Is that so...?
Good lord, I'm jelly.
Hm? What are you talking about?
It's nothing, really.
Alright! Let's keep on having fun!\nShall we try to complete ALL the activities?!
Let's start with kayaking!\nIt seems to be the easiest one to start with.
Yeah, she is being a little weird, isn't she?\nI think this is the first time\nI've seen her so excited.
Me too.\nIt's a side of Ichika \nthat I've never seen before.
What now, what now?\nWhat are you talking about?
We're talking about\nhow you're acting strangely excited.\nAre you okay?
What do you mean, 'are you okay?'\nWe're on a trip, so when else should we be excited?
Come on! It's our last and only\ngraduation trip to Okinawa,\nso let's have fun! Right, Futaro-kun?
Well... It's better than NOT being excited.
I still think she's a little too hyper, though.
Well, it looks like you're having fun, so it's okay.
Alright! Let's keep on having fun!\nShall we try to complete ALL the activities?!
Let's start with kayaking!\nIt seems to be the easiest one to start with.
I still want to ride together with Futaro-kun...\nIs that okay?
I'm fine with it%p-2;――
Do what you'd like, Ichika?\nI'm not really interested in kayaking.
Yay!\nThanks, Nino.
Is it really okay?
Well, dealing with an excited Ichika like this\nwill just tire me out.\nFu-kun, make sure to take care of her properly.
I see...
We're okay to go, let's head out then, Futaro-kun!
Got it. I'll keep you company until the very end. \nI want to have fun too.
Okay!
